name: Pixar Animation Studios
description: Pixar Animation Studios is an American computer animation film studio based in Emeryville, California. A subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, Pixar is renowned for its pioneering work in computer-animated feature films, having produced numerous critically acclaimed and commercially successful movies since its debut with Toy Story in 1995. The studio has consistently set industry standards for storytelling and technical innovation, earning dozens of Academy Awards, Golden Globes, and Grammy Awards. Pixar continues to be a global leader in animation, blending cutting-edge technology with heartfelt narratives that resonate with audiences of all ages worldwide.
